creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jesús Daniel Colmenares Oviedo from comment #11)
Didn't test it yet, but I still wonder how this works with NO_BUILD=yes still present?

Also, I think the subdirs below libexec/appjail aren't really needed, but that's a stylistic nitpick.

Thanks for your fast reaction though, I will have a closer look later!
